Tilting her head back mid-thought, chrome fingertips resting at her collarbone, eyes tracking something overhead just out of frame.
Turning sharply toward a sound, lips parted, one synthetic hand lifting to brush a strand from her throat, caught mid-reaction.
Exhaling slowly while gazing down at her own palm, thumb pressing into the synthetic skin below her jaw, calculating something.
Leaning in to listen, chin lowered, eyes flicking sideways, her chrome fingers grazing the hollow of her throat absently.
Glancing over her bare shoulder at something behind, head barely turned, expression unreadable, hand nowhere in frame.
Caught mid-blink with her temple resting against metal fingers, looking faintly amused at something off-screen and distant.
Watching her own reflection in a surface, lips pressed together, one fingertip tracing the seam where chrome meets skin at her clavicle.
Looking sharply down and left, jaw tensed, her hand lifting to touch the side of her neck as if checking a pulse.
Scanning the middle distance with half-lidded eyes, chin slightly raised, chrome knuckles resting thoughtfully against her lower lip.
Turning away slowly, gaze dropping, synthetic fingers tangled briefly in her hair at the nape, distracted by some passing thought.
Squinting at something bright off-frame, head tilted forward slightly, one chrome fingertip hooked at the corner of her mouth.
Listening hard to something close, eyes narrowed, her hand flat against the side of her throat feeling for vibration.
Caught mid-swallow, looking straight ahead with glassy focus, fingertips drumming once against her opposite shoulder.
Glancing up sharply from under her brow, lips barely parted, chrome thumb pressed into the hinge of her jaw.
Leaning back slightly as if dodging something, chin tucked, her synthetic hand sweeping hair behind one ear mid-movement.
Staring down at nothing in particular, expression blank, one knuckle absently tracing her collarbone side to side.
Turning her face into her own raised wrist, eyes closed briefly, inhaling as though testing a scent or memory.
Caught frowning faintly at something to her right, two chrome fingers tapping a slow rhythm against her throat.
Watching something descend from above, head craning back, lips curling into a half-smirk, hand hanging limp at shoulder height.
Glancing sideways with pupils dilated wide, her synthetic hand sliding from jawline down to rest flat against her sternum.
Biting her lower lip while reaching up to adjust something unseen, chrome fingers grazing her temple, eyes focused upward.
Breathing in sharply through her nose, gaze locked straight ahead, one hand pressed flat where her neck meets shoulder.
Turning her chin to the side as if avoiding something, synthetic fingertips trailing down from ear to collarbone absently.
Caught mid-whisper with eyes closed, chrome hand cupped loosely near her mouth, head tilted toward someone off-frame.
Staring blankly past the camera, jaw slack, her mechanical fingers slowly curling and uncurling against her bare shoulder.
Looking down at her chest with brow furrowed, one fingertip probing at a seam in the synthetic skin above her heart.
Jerking her head to the left suddenly, eyes wide, chrome hand frozen halfway to her face in interrupted motion.
Exhaling through parted lips while gazing at something distant below, knuckles brushing idly along her jawline in slow motion.
Smirking at something overhead, chin raised, her synthetic hand tucked under her opposite arm, fingers splayed across ribs.
Caught yawning with eyes squeezed shut, one chrome palm covering her mouth, shoulders hunched forward slightly in exhaustion.
Narrowing her eyes at something close, head cocked sideways, chrome fingertips pinching the bridge of her nose in mild irritation.
Blinking slowly while facing downward, synthetic hand smoothing across her throat from left to right, testing temperature or texture.
Whipping her head back suddenly, lips tight, one mechanical finger hooked behind her ear as if adjusting hidden equipment.
Staring blankly at her own outstretched fingers, chin dropped, examining the chrome plating where it meets flesh at her wrist.
Caught mid-laugh with head thrown sideways, eyes crinkling, no hand visible, throat exposed and shoulders shaking slightly.
Glancing hard right with jaw clenched, synthetic thumb and forefinger gripping her chin as if forcing herself to look away.
Leaning forward intently, brow lowered, chrome knuckles pressed vertically against her lips like she's silencing herself mid-sentence.
Turning her face toward a light source, eyes closed, mechanical hand resting palm-up on her collarbone catching the glow.
Frowning slightly while looking straight down past her chin, fingertips drumming an impatient pattern against the base of her skull.
Caught exhaling hard through her nose, gaze aimed over her left shoulder, synthetic hand gripping the opposite side of her neck firmly.
Peeling a synthetic lens from her eye with chrome fingertips, blinking rapidly, mouth twisted in concentration as she inspects the film.
Wiping something dark from her lower lip with the back of her wrist, eyes distant and unfocused, still tasting it.
Holding perfectly still while something unseen passes close, nostrils flared, mechanical fingers hovering near but not touching her throat.
Rolling her head slowly to ease tension, eyes tracking the ceiling, one chrome fingertip hooked inside her collar pulling it away.
Muttering something under her breath while scratching absently at the chrome plating behind her ear, gaze fixed on middle distance.
Sucking air through her teeth sharply, head snapping forward, hand clapping against her mouth stifling a laugh or gasp.
Rubbing both temples simultaneously with synthetic fingertips, eyes shut tight, jaw working like she's grinding through pain or thought.
Licking her lips while studying something just below frame, chin angled down, one knuckle tapping twice against her collarbone nervously.
Caught swaying slightly as if dizzy, eyes glassy and half-open, chrome palm braced flat against her forehead for balance.
Tilting her ear toward a sound source, mouth opening slightly to hear better, fingertips ghosting along her jawline measuring vibration.
